features.line1: Manage sales, products, stock, and staff from one dashboard.
features.line2: Track operational performance with practical reports.
features.line3: Designed for bilingual cafe teams (Arabic and English).

faq.line1: You can start with a free trial before any paid billing cycle starts.
faq.line2: Our onboarding team helps you configure your first business setup.

finalCta.title: Ready to launch your cafe operations?

pricingPage.title: Start running your coffee shop with a plan that fits your size
pricingPage.description: Try CafeFlow free for {trialDays} days, then choose monthly or yearly billing based on your needs.
pricingPage.promo: 🔥 Try CafeFlow for free + full free setup for first-time onboarding. Yearly billing gives you {yearlyMonths} months of operation for the price of only {yearlyPayMonths} months.
pricingPage.trialLine: 🎁 Free trial for {trialDays} days - no commitment

planHint.enterprise: For large cafes and multi-branch chains

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.description: Simple and clear operational terms for CafeFlow customers.

inputResponsibility.title: 1) Input responsibility
inputResponsibility.body: The system is not responsible for errors caused by user input or operational decisions based on inaccurate data.

subscription.title: 2) Subscription
subscription.body: Subscription is billed monthly according to the selected plan.

nonPayment.title: 3) Suspension for non-payment
nonPayment.body: Service can be suspended or restricted when payment is not completed.

page.unauthorizedTitle: Not authorized to use manual consumption
page.title: Manual consumption
page.description: Consume stock using recipe quantities without creating a sales order.
page.introLine1: Use this screen for controlled stock deduction scenarios outside normal POS order completion.
page.introLine2: For standard sales flow, continue using POS where stock consumption runs automatically.

rules.1: Select only active products with a configured recipe.
rules.2: Entered quantity means number of product units consumed.
rules.3: Each ingredient is deducted using recipe quantity multiplied by entered quantity.
rules.4: Operation stops if any ingredient has insufficient stock.
rules.5: Every deduction creates stock movement records for audit.

page.emptyDescription: Add active products first before using manual consumption.

form.title: Execute recipe-based consumption
form.description: Rule: required stock = recipe quantity per unit x consumed quantity.

layout.unauthorizedDescription: This section is available only to authorized CafeFlow platform operators.
layout.unauthorizedHintTitle: If you should be the operator
layout.unauthorizedHintDescription:
Your deployment must satisfy both, together:
• Environment variable PLATFORM_OWNER_EMAIL — set to the same email you use to sign in (the value is never shown here).
• Database field isPlatformOwner — true on your User row for that identity.
Then sign in again. Tenant café accounts alone do not grant this console.
layout.stepUpDescription: Enter your CafeFlow account password again. Your email is already verified by your session; this step proves you still control the password for the operator account.
layout.stepUpDescriptionTotp: Enter your account password and the 6-digit code from your authenticator app. Values configured on the server (TOTP secret) are never shown here.
layout.stepUpDescriptionExtra: Enter your account password and the operator passphrase configured on the server (PLATFORM_EXTRA_SECRET). The passphrase itself is never shown here.
layout.stepUpDescriptionBoth: Enter your account password, your authenticator 6-digit code, and the operator passphrase. Server-side secrets are never displayed on this screen.
layout.stepUpTotpHint: Time-based code from the app you registered with the operator TOTP secret.
layout.stepUpExtraSecretHint: Must match PLATFORM_EXTRA_SECRET in the deployment environment (not your login email).
layout.stepUpSecurityNote: Use HTTPS in production. After a period of inactivity you will be asked again. Sign out clears this extra lock.
